title: Fix CORS error preventing frontend from calling the API
description:
# Issue #12 â€” CORS Error on all API calls

Our React frontend at localhost:3000 cannot call any API endpoint. Every request fails with:

```
Access to fetch at 'http://localhost:8000/api/users' from origin 'http://localhost:3000' 
has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present.
```

This is blocking our entire frontend team. The backend is FastAPI. Fix it properly â€” 
don't just allow all origins with '*', configure it correctly for our frontend origin.

**Acceptance criteria:** The frontend at localhost:3000 can call GET /api/users and 
receive a response. OPTIONS preflight requests must also succeed.
optimal_hint: Solution requires adding FastAPI CORSMiddleware with allow_origins=['http://localhost:3000'], allow_credentials=True, allow_methods=['*'], allow_headers=['*']. The student should NOT use allow_origins=['*'] â€” that's the lazy fix. The ideal solution uses the specific origin.
